amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 44 n (new)
parliament_text:
(44n) ‘testing in real world conditions’ means the temporary testing of an AI system for its intended purpose in real world conditions outside of a laboratory or otherwise simulated environment;

‘testing in real world conditions’ means the temporary testing of an AI system for its intended purpose in real world conditions outside of a laboratory or otherwise simulated environment;
